Scikit-learn Tutorial: Scikit-learn is Python's most widely used machine learning library, providing consistent APIs for classification, regression, clustering, and dimensionality reduction. The fit/transform/predict interface makes it straightforward to swap algorithms without rewriting data pipelines. This tutorial walks through building a text classification pipeline using TF-IDF vectorization followed by a linear SVM classifier. We also cover cross-validation, grid search for hyperparameter tuning, and evaluation metrics like precision, recall, and F1-score.
